summary: Most people buy the wrong health insurance. Don’t be one of them! Health insurance is confusing—and most people get it wrong. This video breaks down 10 critical insights that you must know before you buy a policy. Watch this to avoid costly mistakes and make smarter choices for you and your family!

chapters.label: Should You and Your Parents Have Separate Health Insurance Policies?
How to Buy Health Insurance for Parents (When Premiums Are So High)
How Much Health Insurance Do You Need for a Young Family?
Common Exclusions in Health Insurance You Should Know
What to Check Beyond Exclusions When Choosing a Policy
How to Ensure a Smooth, Cashless Health Insurance Claim
Top Reasons Why Health Insurance Claims Get Rejected
Is It Wise to Have Multiple Health Insurance Policies?
Should You Buy a Top-Up Policy Alongside Corporate Health Insurance?
Do Hospitals Charge More When You Have Health Insurance?

tool.label: Real Retirement
tool.reason: Find the corpus you actually need to retire, and whether your current savings get you there.

disclaimer: This video is for educational purposes only. It is not financial, legal, or insurance advice. Please consult a qualified professional before making any financial decisions. The views expressed are personal and not affiliated with any organization or company. Always read policy documents carefully before purchasing any insurance product.
